info.name: Sapiens RBAC REST API
info.description:
Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) REST API for Sapiens User Management Service.

This API provides comprehensive CRUD operations with 12 endpoints per entity:
- GET /{entity} - List all
- POST /{entity} - Create
- GET /{entity}/{id} - Get by ID
- PUT /{entity}/{id} - Full update
- PATCH /{entity}/{id} - Partial update
- DELETE /{entity}/{id} - Soft delete
- GET /{entity}/search - Search
- POST /{entity}/bulk - Bulk create
- POST /{entity}/upsert - Upsert
- GET /{entity}/trash - List deleted
- POST /{entity}/{id}/restore - Restore
- DELETE /{entity}/trash - Empty trash

**Authentication:** All endpoints require JWT Bearer token authentication.

**Base URL (Dev):** http://localhost:3003/api/v1
**Base URL (Prod):** https://api.startapp.id/sapiens/api/v1

item.name: Authentication
item.description: Authentication endpoints (login, register, password reset, email verification)

item.name: Login
item.description: Authenticate user and get JWT tokens

item.name: Refresh Token
item.description: Get new access token using refresh token

item.name: Reset Password
item.description: Reset password using token from email

item.name: Logout
item.description: Logout current session or all sessions

item.name: Setup MFA
item.description: Initialize MFA setup, returns TOTP secret and QR code URL

item.name: Verify MFA
item.description: Verify TOTP code to complete MFA setup

item.name: List MFA Devices
item.description: List all MFA devices for current user

item.name: Remove MFA Device
item.description: Remove an MFA device by ID

item.name: Regenerate Backup Codes
item.description: Generate new backup codes (invalidates old ones)

item.name: User Operations
item.description: User profile, password, email, sessions, and admin operations

item.name: List User Sessions
item.description: List all active sessions for user

request.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all users
Full update of user (all fields required)
Partial update of user (only specified fields)
Search users by username, email, or name
Create or update user based on unique fields
Retrieve a paginated list of all roles

item.name: Search roles
item.description: Search roles by name or description

item.name: User Roles
item.description: User-Role assignment entity CRUD operations (12 endpoints)

item.name: Role Permissions
item.description: Role-Permission assignment entity CRUD operations (12 endpoints)

item.name: User Permissions
item.description: User-Permission (direct grant) entity CRUD operations (12 endpoints)

item.name: User Preferences
item.description: User preference entity CRUD operations (12 endpoints)

item.name: User Settings
item.description: User settings entity CRUD operations (12 endpoints)

item.name: User Sessions
item.description: User session entity CRUD operations (12 endpoints)

item.name: User Security Events
item.description: User security event entity CRUD operations (12 endpoints)

item.name: MFA Devices
item.description: MFA device entity CRUD operations (12 endpoints)

item.name: Password Reset Tokens
item.description: Password reset token entity CRUD operations (12 endpoints)

item.name: Audit Logs
item.description: Audit log entity CRUD operations (12 endpoints)

item.name: Policy Assignments
item.description: Policy assignment entity CRUD operations (12 endpoints)

item.name: System Settings
item.description: System settings entity CRUD operations (12 endpoints)

exec: if (!pm.variables.get("token")) { console.log("Warning: No authentication token found."); }
pm.test("Response time is less than 2000ms", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(2000); });
